headline: How Strong Q1 Results And Higher 2026 Guidance At Welltower (WELL) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Welltower Inc. reported first-quarter 2026 results on April 28, showing revenue of US$3.35 billion and net income of US$728.67 million, alongside higher earnings per share and a US$0.74 quarterly dividend declaration. The company also raised its full-year 2026 net income guidance and Same Store NOI growth assumptions, signaling management’s confidence in its operating momentum and capital allocation plans. We will now examine how Welltower’s upgraded 2026 earnings guidance and stronger...

headline: Apple, Amazon, TSMC Top List Of Earnings Triple Plays As Beat-And-Raise Stocks Surge
summary: Apple, Amazon and TSMC are among the largest companies to deliver earnings "triple plays" this season.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Welltower, Raises Price Target to $255
summary: Citigroup  analyst Nick Joseph   maintains Welltower (NYSE:WELL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $245 to $255.
